info.title: Lupira Cal API
info.description: Calendar backend for Lupira (contacts live in LupiraContactApi; the DAV protocol surface in LupiraDavApi). Authenticate with a Bearer token issued by the OIDC provider (Authentik).

get.summary: The caller's resolved local identity (JIT-provisioned on first login).

post.summary: Idempotently ensure the caller has the standard calendar set; returns it.

get.summary: List the calendars the caller can access.

post.summary: Create a calendar. (Address books are managed by LupiraContactApi.)
Grant a member access to a calendar (access = owner|read-write|read; default owner).

delete.summary: Revoke a member's access to a calendar (by email). 409 if it would remove the last owner.

get.summary: Search calendar items (text + tag + parent + category/status filter; recurrence expanded in-window). Text queries with no from/to match all-time; without a query the window defaults to ±1 year. skip/take page over occurrences sorted by start (desc=true for newest first). Only items accepted into a calendar you can read.

post.summary: Create a calendar item (filed into CalendarId if given, else unfiled for later curation).

put.summary: Update a calendar item (only provided fields change).

delete.summary: Delete a calendar item (soft delete + tombstone).

get.summary: Calendar items anchored to a LupiraGeoApi place (its location, or a travel endpoint). Only items in a calendar you can read.

post.summary: Merge arbitrary JSON metadata into a calendar item.

put.summary: Set the LLM-interpreted payload on an item (server-side only; never in ICS). 409 if the item carries an action.
Set the deterministic payload on an item (server-side only; never in ICS). 409 if the item carries a prompt.

post.summary: Link a calendar item to an external reference (e.g. a LupiraTasks item, or an Activity-API engagement/project).

get.summary: Reverse lookup: calendar items linked to a given external reference.
List items proposed into a calendar (awaiting accept/reject).

post.summary: Accept a proposed item into a calendar (then visible over DAV).
File an existing item into a calendar (status=proposed|accepted, default proposed).

delete.summary: Remove an item from a calendar (reject / unfile).

post.summary: Invite a contact (must be a Contact id). role = chair|req-participant|opt-participant|non-participant.

Bearer.description: OIDC bearer token. Send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
